title: Fly zapper,18W Flying Insect Control Lamp, Electric Fly Killer, Bug Zapper for Indoor,Bedroom and Gardens
bullet_points: Effectively eliminate most flying insects: mosquito, Aedes, gnats, midges,etc. Please use this bug zapper at night and in the dark.

The bulb light attracts flying insects and the high-voltage electric grid zaps them on contact. Efficient physical mosquito control. So you don't have to put up with the smell of sprays, insecticides and attractants. You also don't have to worry about your pets eating insects that have been killed by pesticides.
Light weight & Easy to use,It’s very light so you can hang it everywhere you like. No warm up, Starts working when plugged in.Designed with a switch, you don't need to plug and unplug frequently.

Easy to clean & Replaceable bulb: Dead bugs will fall onto the tray, you just need to clean the tray with brush provided. 18W Bulb is replaceable. If your bulb becomes less effective at attracting flying insects, you can replace it.
Our bug zapper area coverage up to 1/2 Acre. Good for home, patio, balcony, courtyard, front porch, garden, pergola, deck, backyard, swimming pool, garage, farm, etc.
